form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when raced on the pace before fading 8th of 13 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 2022 over 1100m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Nominator with 57kg at $6. Prefer to see how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when raced on the pace before fading 8th of 13 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 12 2022 over 1100m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Nominator with 57kg at $6. Prefer to see how he returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Laid in under pressure over the final 150m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 2nd in a small field at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cge Mdn-Sw on December 16 over 1150m, slow going neck behind Heroic Deed with 55kg at $9.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Plenty of scope for improvement and looms as a serious chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Resuming after a break; only one run when 2nd in a small field at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cge Mdn-Sw on December 16 over 1150m, slow going neck behind Heroic Deed with 55kg at $9.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Plenty of scope for improvement and looms as a serious chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead throughout the early stages.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Kembla Grange Cg&E Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pimlico with 54.5kg at $2.60. First up last campaign fifth of 11 at Canterbury Super Mdn-Sw September 17 over 1100m, 2 len behind Benevac with 57kg at $4.40. Everything points to a solid return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Kembla Grange Cg&E Mdn-Sw October 25 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pimlico with 54.5kg at $2.60. First up last campaign fifth of 11 at Canterbury Super Mdn-Sw September 17 over 1100m, 2 len behind Benevac with 57kg at $4.40. Everything points to a solid return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start shifted in and made contact with Orange Tsunami.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped Benevac.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when struggled in the run home; second last of 12 at Kembla Grange Cg&E Mdn-Sw on October 25 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pimlico carrying 55kg at $7. Gelded over the break and expecting a strong run fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when struggled in the run home; second last of 12 at Kembla Grange Cg&E Mdn-Sw on October 25 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pimlico carrying 55kg at $7. Gelded over the break and expecting a strong run fresh.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 2nd in a small field at this track Super Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1000m, slow going head behind Stubborn Emmelie carrying 57kg at $2.80. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Wyong Mdn on July 5 over 1000m, slow going 1.3 len behind Bev's Nine with 58.5kg at $11. Gritty return and can go one better here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Second run back. First-up after seven months 2nd in a small field at this track Super Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1000m, slow going head behind Stubborn Emmelie carrying 57kg at $2.80. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Wyong Mdn on July 5 over 1000m, slow going 1.3 len behind Bev's Nine with 58.5kg at $11. Gritty return and can go one better here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping, shifted ground. Near the 150m brushed by Wal's Me Mate.
Began awkwardly, shifted outwards and bumped Miss Trentino.
Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Flying Argyle.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Filly by Circus Maximus making her first appearance. Ran 3rd in a trial at Beaumont (Newcastle) over 850m on March 24. Has trialled well enough heading into this, keep safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Filly by Circus Maximus making her first appearance. Ran 3rd in a trial at Beaumont (Newcastle) over 850m on March 24. Has trialled well enough heading into this, keep safe.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when second last of 8 at Warwick Farm Super Mdn on December 3 over 1000m, 10 len behind Ice Kool carrying 57kg at $51. Prefer to see how she returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when second last of 8 at Warwick Farm Super Mdn on December 3 over 1000m, 10 len behind Ice Kool carrying 57kg at $51. Prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At debut, ran on from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $8. Improver.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. At debut, ran on from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $8. Improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. At the latest run ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going head behind Ascot Green carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. The race before that failed to make an impression; 6th of 8 at Goulburn Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind Master Yoda carrying 56.5kg at $5. Frustrating filly who comes here deep into the prep.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Dual acceptor. The race before that failed to make an impression; 6th of 8 at Goulburn Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind Master Yoda carrying 56.5kg at $5. Frustrating filly who comes here deep into the prep.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly and then from a wide barrier shifted behind runners.
Near the 50m put in an awkward stride.
